title: Where Can I Buy Revival of Evangelion
display_title: Where Can I Buy Revival of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Where Can I Buy "Revival of Evangelion"?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:09 pm No, not Renewal. No, not Rebuild. Revival. This is what Revival of Evangelion is . I've looked all over the interpig, but can't find anywhere to buy it. WHERE CAN I? If I can't, I'd at least like to find out where to buy the Renewal movies (I have an MKV of Renewal version of EoE and want a legitimate copy).

[]:             Quote Post by King_Panther13 » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:20 pm I thought Revival and Renewal were the same thing....even searching on the Wikipedia "Neon Genesis Evangelion Media" page, the word "renewal" didn't show up at all.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:35 pm Why not just watch Death (true)^2 and EoE back to back? It's basically the same thing. I don't think there is a legitimate copy of Revival.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:45 pm Renewal is the footage/sound remastered of Evangelion: series and movie-wise. (The series was released as Platinum state-side because it didn't included the films.) Revival is Death(true^2) released along with The End of Evangelion (Theater-version, obviously, NOT the video-version release), the way the movies were meant to be since final edit-wise. This IS the same thing as what Renewal (and previous Japanese-released) and Mangle versions have.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:49 pm Ah, I found a set that contains them both on Evastore's official website... FOR SEVENTY-TWO DOLLARS!!! Not to mention the expenses of shipping it through a proxy service to get it here to America... EDIT: You know what? This can't really be $72, can it? Here 's the link... It says the price is 8,190 円. Is 円 the same as yen?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:53 pm Try your luck here: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/search.html?current=20&result=24430326&restrict=ALL&word_1=GC_evangelion&sort= And, OH CRAP. Rebuild 08 Calendar! http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=2008CL-165

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 4:57 pm It's still $47... which I suppose is fair, for being two movies. But I'd only be able to watch it on my computer without a region-free DVD player.... ; Then again, I think there are programs to convert DVDs into region-free DVDs. EDIT: Wow, look at the credits for that calendar! Hideaki Anno made the WHOLE THING!!!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 08, 2007 5:54 pm NAveryW wrote: It's still $47... which I suppose is fair, for being two movies.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 5:59 pm I suppose I could watch it in English... is the English track on Renewal? It's there in my MKV file.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 08, 2007 6:02 pm is the English track on Renewal?

[]: More options             Quote Post by XX » Wed Sep 12, 2007 6:35 am 12/9/07 GMT 12:30 · 劇場版 NEON GENESIS EVANGELION - DEATH (TRUE) 2 : Air / まごころを君に Price: 4,382¥ (Tax Included) 30 used & new available from 3,980¥ Availability: In Stock . Ships from and sold by Amazon.co.jp . Gift-wrap available. · THE FEATURE FILMS NEON GENESIS EVANGELION DTS COLLECTORS Edition Price: 6,261¥ (Tax Included) 13 used & new available from 6,261¥ Availability: Usually ships within 4 to 5 days . Ships from and sold by Amazon.co.jp . Gift-wrap available. · Amazon.co.jp - 'Help in English' Page [url]http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/help/customer/display.html/503-4316672-0484769?ie=UTF8&nodeId=1039576[/url] BrikHaus wrote: Nice to see you back, XX.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Sep 12, 2007 9:01 am Nice to see you back, XX.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Sep 12, 2007 6:06 pm Thanks, but I already ordered from Stardust's link... >_> It shipped yesterday. It said it takes an average of 1-3 weeks to arrive, but could take up to 12. Twelve weeks. RoE might be online by then. I doubt it, but I can hope...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 12, 2007 7:08 pm What XX posted was actually the Renewal Feature Films.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Sep 12, 2007 7:09 pm NAveryW wrote: It shipped yesterday. It said it takes an average of 1-3 weeks to arrive, but could take up to 12.[/size]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 12, 2007 7:34 pm Good point, Brik-kun. I forgot to mention, NAveryW, that I ordered from there before and I think it took 3 weeks the most for my order to arrive.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Sep 12, 2007 11:19 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: What XX posted was actually the Renewal Feature Films.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Sep 12, 2007 11:59 pm No, I'm fairly certain the pre-renewal versions are out of print.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Sep 13, 2007 8:35 am NAveryW wrote: Ah, I found a set that contains them both on Evastore's official website... FOR SEVENTY-TWO DOLLARS!!! Not to mention the expenses of shipping it through a proxy service to get it here to America... EDIT: You know what? This can't really be $72, can it? Here 's the link... It says the price is 8,190 円. Is 円 the same as yen?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Sep 13, 2007 8:57 am You don't need a proxy service. You can buy it from YesAsia.com, cdJapan.co.jp, or Amazon.co.jp
